title.en: Ye Tian was based in the thunder domain and ign...

content.en:
Ye Tian was based in the thunder domain and ignored the thunder attack.

When the Thunder Dove Domain Ancestor saw this scene, his heart was immediately shocked.

"The Holy Armor Holy Technique of the Extreme Realm, the Golden Body Holy Technique of the Extreme Realm!!"

Thunder Dove Domain Ancestor said incredulously.

The two extreme realm holy skills, this is too exaggerated, and they are both defensive holy skills, the combined effect is too terrifying, and it is simply too difficult to break the defense of the ancestor of the Ten Thousand Law Domain.

Unless it was to kill the Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor, it would be difficult to hit him hard.

At this time, Ye Tian also made a move.

"Holy Technique—False Slash!"

Ye Tian waved his hand, and the void slash broke through the Thunder Domain, slashing towards the Thunder Dove Domain Ancestor.

The Thunder Dove Domain Ancestor turned into thunder and dodged instantly, and the Void Slash was a spatial holy skill, ignoring the distance, and instantly hit the Thunder Dove Domain Ancestor's body.

Poof!!!

One of the only defensive holy skills that the Thunder Dove Domain Ancestor knew was torn apart, but he urged a defensive holy object on his body in time, which was able to block Ye Tian's Void Slash and not tear his body apart by the Void Slash.

But even so, the power of the Holy Technique hit his body, and part of the power penetrated into his body, causing him to be slightly injured.

I have to say that Ye Tian's strength is stronger than him.

"I'm not an opponent, let's shoot together!"

The Thunder Dove Domain Ancestor sent a message to the Mangu Domain Ancestor and the Black Scale Domain Ancestor, and the three four-star kings joined forces, perhaps there was hope to kill Ye Tian.

"Good!"

The Mangu Domain Ancestor and the Black Scale Domain Ancestor agreed.

Although it was a competition, Ye Tian challenged the Ghost Fox Organization alone, and the Ghost Fox Organization could naturally besiege Ye Tian with many people.

If Ye Tian is unwilling, he can admit defeat and retreat.

If you don't want to throw in the towel, you have to accept this rule.

Boom !!

The Mangu Domain Ancestor and the Black Scale Domain Ancestor made a move.

I saw that the body of the ancestor of the Mangu Domain continued to grow larger, turning into a majestic giant, holding a giant axe of holy relics, like a mythical Pangu that opened the world and slashed at Ye Tian with one blow.

Rumble!!!!!

The endless void shattered, and the devastating axe light enveloped Ye Tian.

The power of this blow is much stronger than the thunder domain of the Thunder Dove Domain Ancestor, and the Mangu Domain Ancestor is known for its strength, but the speed is weak, so the strength is not strong.

But now, the three four-star kings have joined forces to besiege Ye Tian.

The Thunder Dove Domain Ancestor's Thunder Domain could limit Ye Tian's speed, but the Black Scale Domain Ancestor did not limit it, and immediately cast a soul holy technique, the Nine Ring Tower, and blasted towards Ye Tian.

Under such circumstances, it would be absolutely difficult for Ye Tian to dodge Mangu Domain Ancestor's blow.

At this moment, Ye Tian performed another holy technique, the Imperial Body!

As soon as the amplification holy technique was cast, Ye Tian's strength skyrocketed.

I saw Ye Tian use the Hegemony Saint Technique with one hand, and he destroyed the axe light of the Mangu Domain Ancestor with one punch.

Then, Ye Tian used the Streamer Saint Technique, killing the Mangu Domain Ancestor at an incredible speed, and once again punched the Mangu Domain Ancestor.

Bang !!

Mangu Domain Ancestor couldn't withstand Ye Tian's power, and was directly blasted out, and the holy objects on his body began to crack, his body continued to crack, and the blood scattered into the void, turning into lakes everywhere.

After this blow, the Mangu Domain Ancestor was hit hard!

"Five Elements Ban!"

Ye Tian used this holy technique to seal the void, making it impossible for the three four-star kings to escape.

At this time, the three of Man Gu Domain Ancestor, Black Scale Domain Ancestor, and Thunder Dove Domain Ancestor were extremely dignified.

They didn't expect Ye Tian's strength to be so strong, none of the three of them were Ye Tian's opponents, and Ye Tian had almost no flaws, they couldn't help Ye Tian at all, and Ye Tian's attack was not something they could withstand.

"How can there be such a terrifying saint endowment, so many holy skills, and all of them have reached the limit realm!"

Thunder Dove Domain Ancestor was shocked.

If he had known this, he would not have come out to fight Ye Tian, and even if he did, he would at least summon more four-star kings!

"Town God!"

Ye Tian used this holy technique to attack the souls of the three four-star kings.

"Ahhh!!h

Mangu Yuzu and the others screamed one after another, and their souls were injured.

If they hadn't all condensed the soul light, otherwise it would not have been a minor injury, but a soul shattered and died.

The three four-star kings kept dodging to avoid Ye Tian's attacks.

However, under the Extreme Saint Technique Streamer, their speed was simply ridiculous, and there was no way to dodge Ye Tian at all.

Puff puff puff!!!!

Under the attack of a sect holy technique, the three major four-star kings were constantly injured, among which the Mangu Domain Ancestor was the most seriously injured.

If this continues, it won't be long before the Mangu Domain Ancestor will fall and die.

"Lei Gang Domain Ancestor, save us !!!"

The Thunder Dove Domain Ancestor asked for help.

Ray Island Division.

Lei Gang Domain Ancestor also looked helpless, he could feel that the Thunder Island Branch was locked by an invincible Domain Ancestor.

Once he made a move, that Invincible Domain Ancestor would definitely make a move.

Moreover, he also recognized who the Invincible Domain Ancestor was, it was the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor of the Battle Gate, and he was much stronger than him.

Although the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor was not as good as the Ten Emperors of the Ghost Fox Organization, he was definitely one of the top existences of the Ten Emperors, and it was too easy for such an invincible Domain Ancestor to kill him.

Although he is an invincible domain ancestor, he is actually not much stronger than a four-star king, where can he save the Thunder Dove Domain Ancestor!

However, he is not very worried.

Because, the other four-star kings have also arrived!

-------------------

Whoa!!!

Outside the ban of the five elements, one figure after another appeared, and it was a four-star king of the Ghost Fox Organization, and the aura of one of the four-star kings was even more terrifying, much stronger than the average four-star king.

Ghost Fox Organization - Yuanfeng Domain Ancestor!

He's coming!

"Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestor, revoke the blockade, you and I fight one-on-one, how about it?"

Yuanfeng Domain Ancestor spoke.

"When my battle here is over, I'll fight you again!"

Ye Tian replied.

He didn't want to let go of the Mangu Domain Ancestors, his challenge to the Ghost Fox Organization was fake, and revenge was real.

Therefore, he must kill some more four-star kings to let the Ghost Fox Organization know what the consequences will be if they attack him.

So today, the Mangu Domain Ancestor is dead!

"Attack !!!"

Yuanfeng Domain Ancestor said coldly.

Suddenly, one after another four-star kings attacked the Five Elements Forbidden from outside the Five Elements Blockade.

Thundered!!!!

The Five Elements Ban was constantly cracked by the attacks of Yuanfeng Yu Ancestor and others, and maybe after a few breaths, the Five Elements Ban would be broken.

"Then I won't hide my strength anymore!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Originally, although he mobilized the Soul Holy Light, he actually only activated one-third of the Soul Holy Light, and he didn't exert all his strength at all.

Abrupt.

Ye Tian used the Time Saint Technique-Eternal Saint Technique on the Mangu Domain Ancestor!

The time of Mangu Domain Ancestor's location was frozen, and at this time, Ye Tian slammed into Mangu Domain Ancestor's body with all his strength.

There was a click!!!

Mangu Domain Ancestor's body was completely shattered, and his soul was annihilated by the blow just now.

At this point, the ancestor of the Mangu Domain fell and died!
